pl.netigen.coreapi.payments

Class Payments

  • pl.netigen.coreapi.payments.Payments
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    INoAds, IPayments

    public class Payments
implements IPayments

    Base class for interface IPayments implementations

    Provides also access to payments repository and default sku values

    See Also:
    interface IPayments

    • Constructor Detail

      • Payments

        public Payments(@NotNull
                android.content.Context paymentsImplContext,
                @NotNull
                java.lang.String packageName,
                @NotNull
                java.util.List<java.lang.String> noAdsInAppSkuList,
                @NotNull
                java.util.List<java.lang.String> inAppSkuList)

        Base class for interface IPayments implementations

        Provides also access to payments repository and default sku values

        Parameters:
        paymentsImplContext - Context using in current Payments implementation and for get packageName
        packageName - Application package name for default no ads sku
        noAdsInAppSkuList -

        List of no ads sku available in application

        For default it is one sku: packageName +".noads"

        inAppSkuList - List of all payments sku available in Applicationfor default it is only one default no-ads sku: packageName +".noads"
        See Also:
        interface IPayments

    • Method Detail

      • getPaymentsRepo

        @NotNull
public IPaymentsRepo getPaymentsRepo()

        Current interface IPaymentsRepo implementation, current design uses androidx.room.Room database + Flow/LiveData for observing purchases data

        See Also:
        interface IPaymentsRepo, androidx.room.Room, LiveData

      • getOwnedPurchasesSkuLD

        @NotNull
public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<java.util.List> getOwnedPurchasesSkuLD()

        LiveData with list of payments owned by user (this payments String sku)

        This is updated with each start of application, and with user interaction with payments

        See Also:
        LiveData, String

      • getNoAdsActive

        @NotNull
public kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow<java.lang.Boolean> getNoAdsActive()

        Emits Flow<Boolean> indicating that no ads in-app purchase is or has changed to active or inactive Use this for behave with no ads related stuff, (e.g. hide/show no ads buy buttons)

        See Also:
        Boolean

      • getInAppSkuDetailsLD

        @NotNull
public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<java.util.List> getInAppSkuDetailsLD()

        LiveData with list of class NetigenSkuDetails, use this to get information of current available in app payments

        warning this currently not working/tested in HMS!!

        See Also:
        LiveData, class NetigenSkuDetails

      • getSubsSkuDetailsLD

        @NotNull
public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<java.util.List> getSubsSkuDetailsLD()

        LiveData with list of class NetigenSkuDetails, use this to get information of current available subscriptions

        warning this currently not working/tested in HMS!!

        See Also:
        LiveData, class NetigenSkuDetails

      • onActivityResult

        public void onActivityResult(int requestCode,
                             int resultCode,
                             @NotNull
                             android.content.Intent data)

        Used only in HMS payments implementation, to handle billing events Not need to be called manually

        See Also:
        Activity.onActivityResult

      • getPaymentsImplContext

        @NotNull
public android.content.Context getPaymentsImplContext()

        Context

        using in current Payments implementation and for get packageName

        See Also:
        Context

      • getPackageName

        @NotNull
public java.lang.String getPackageName()

        Application package name for default no ads sku

      • getNoAdsInAppSkuList

        @NotNull
public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getNoAdsInAppSkuList()

        List of no ads sku available in application

        For default it is one sku: packageName +".noads"

        See Also:
        packageName

      • getInAppSkuList

        @NotNull
public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getInAppSkuList()

        List of all payments sku available in Application

        for default it is only one default no-ads sku: packageName +".noads"

        See Also:
        packageName
